case_title: JUNIPERO SERRA HOUSE VS. DAVID AVANSINO et al

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF JUNIPERO SERRA HOUSE'S APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT AND WRIT OF EXECUTION: JUDGMENT PER STIPULATION IS GRANTED BASED ON AFFIDAVITS SUBMITTED. NO TESTIMONY IS PERMITTED. ATTORNEY CULLUM STIPULATES THERE WILL BE NO EXECUTION ON THE JUDGMENT PRIOR TO 05/12/04. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II REPORTER: PATTY LEE HUBBLE, CSR #3058

calendar.matters:
For Hearing On Application For Judgment And Writ Of Execution
Off Calendar Apr-22-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Carole Cullum, Esq. (415) 863-5300 for Plaintiff and Moving Party Junipero Serra House
David Avansino, Defendant Propria Persona
RULING:
PLAINTIFF JUNIPERO SERRA HOUSE'S APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT AND WRIT OF EXECUTION: Judgment per stipulation is GRANTED based on affidavits submitted. No testimony is permitted. Attorney Cullum stipulates there will be no execution on the judgment prior to 05/12/04. Order signed. (301/AJR/DS) Reporter: Patty Lee Hubble, CSR #3058
